W5-N.name: W5 baby bed 5-in-1
W5-N.description:
Baby bed with cradle
This practical and versatile 5-in-1 bed with a cradle is perfect for small rooms. It has a built-in cradle (additionally paid) that gently rocks the baby "side to side". The ability to dismantle the cradle gives you the option of using a free-standing cot or a cot on wheels. Thanks to its compact dimensions, it fits through doors and makes it easy to move between rooms. Perfect for children up to 3 years old.

BASIC-W2-3w1.description: Basic 3-in-1 mattress sold with the crib. Made of high-quality T-25 flexible foam with medium firmness. The mattress is divided into three parts, making it suitable for every configuration of the 7-in-1 crib.

677.name: Small Basic bed mattress W2
677.description: Rucken Basic is a complete and proven mattress made of high-quality T-25 elastic foam with medium H3 hardness. It will ensure undisturbed and peaceful sleep in comfortable conditions and the healthy development of your baby from the first days of life.

732.name: Small Stabil bed mattress W2
732.description: Stabil is a mattress with durable and highly elastic latex in the central part, which perfectly adapts to the shape of the baby's body. We managed to enhance the unique features of latex with excellent ventilation and the possibility of natural latex disinfection in a home freezer. All thanks to the production process, which takes place on the most modern machines.

673.name: Small Aseptic crib mattress W2
673.description: A mattress with excellent antibacterial and antiallergic properties. Like our other mattresses, we made it of highly elastic HR35 foam, but we did not add additional functional layers. Thanks to this, the antibacterial properties of the foam play the main role here, along with excellent and healthy support for the baby.

671.name: Aero Large Crib Mattress W2
671.description:
Aero is probably the best breathable mattress on the market. The excellent ventilation of the Air Pro system used in our mattresses is additionally supported by a 3D mat added over the entire surface.

DRESSER-NATURAL.name: Dresser
DRESSER-NATURAL.description:
A dresser with
a height-adjustable changing table
Fronts and legs made of solid beech wood.
2 deep drawers + 1 shallower drawer – perfect for 
cosmetics and diapers.
Handles can be mounted at any height and across 
the full width of the dresser.
Adjustable changing table – 4 height levels, 
adjustable every 5 cm (up to 20 cm).
Option to mount the changing table on the right, 
left, or in the center of the dresser.
Stable arched legs – harmoniously matching our cribs.
